title: DSA Practice Upgrades: Real-time AI Assist & Enhanced Problem Flow
summary: Showcase CodeGrind's refreshed practice loop: AI-assisted problem solving with Azure OpenAI, improved problem filtering, and a sharper UI flow that ties LeetCode-style challenges to real-time feedback.
core_message: CodeGrind now blends LeetCode-style problems with an upgraded AI assistant, delivering real-time guidance, difficulty-aware filtering, and a more engaging problem-to-solution workflow. This centers practical practice, learning momentum, and tangible progress tracking for users exploring data structures and algorithms.
cta: Try the refreshed practice flow and share a screenshot of your first solved problem with AI guidance.
visual_brief: Static hero-style banner: CodeGrind UI showing a code editor on one side and an AI assistant panel with a chat-like interface; include a solved problem badge and a subtle cyberpunk accent to reflect the CodeBreach aesthetic. Use bold title overlay: 'DSA Practice Upgrades'.

media.selection_reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.
